name: Chicken Fried Steak Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour and spices in a shallow dish.
2. Add enough water to make a runny paste.
3. Drench the steak in the paste, then dredge in cracker crumbs.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Fry the steaks until golden brown on all sides.
6. Remove and drain on waxed paper.
7. For gravy, add 4 tablespoons butter to the pan and melt.
8. Add 4 tablespoons flour and stir until thickened.
9. Gradually whisk in about 1 cup milk, stirring constantly.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Serve hot with mashed potatoes, green beans and biscuits.
